messages.content: Welcome friend, I would like to know more about you so that we can get to know each other more better, and we can share stories together, have you married and what are you doing to make a living?
Welcome friend, I would like to know more about you so that we can get to know each other more better, and we can share stories together, have you married and what are you doing to make a living?

Good day my friend, it is a pleasure to have you as a friend, my name is Jessica Linda, from Houston Texas in the United States of America but prensently in Afghanistan for the peacekeeping mission, where you from?
